title: erysimum senoneri subsp. icaricum
intro: Erysimum senoneri subsp. icaricum, also known as Icaris or Icarian Rocket, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Erysimum senoneri subsp. icaricum include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce oxidative stress. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of essential oils, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
